output.summary: Successfully applied all fixes to CardsGrid block: (1) Removed redundant manual attribute extraction from PHP files, (2) Updated dark mode pattern to match project standard with container padding and vertical pseudo-element insets, (3) Added aria-label fallback when heading is empty, (4) Rewrote test page to use DemoContainer wrappers with 13 comprehensive test scenarios.

filesModified.purpose: Removed redundant manual attribute extraction, updated dark mode pattern, added aria-label fallback
changes: Removed manual $anchor, $darkMode, $eyebrow, $heading, $description, $columns extractions - using auto-extracted variables
Section dark mode classes: removed 'md:py-24', kept only 'dark bg-transparent!'
Container dark mode classes: added 'py-10 md:py-15' and updated pseudo-element to 'before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8'
Added aria-label='Cards Grid' fallback to theme_block_props() when heading is empty
Added ?? null coalescing operators to auto-extracted variables in template

filesModified.purpose: Updated dark mode pattern to match PHP and project standard
changes: Section dark mode classes: removed 'md:py-24', kept only 'dark bg-transparent!'
Container dark mode classes: added 'py-10 md:py-15' and updated pseudo-element to 'before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8'
TSX and PHP dark mode patterns now match exactly
Removed manual $anchor, $image, $title, $description, $button extractions - using auto-extracted variables
Added ?? [] coalescing for $image and $button in derived variables and usage
Added ?? '' coalescing for $title and $description in conditional checks

filesModified.purpose: Rewrote test page to use DemoContainer wrappers with comprehensive scenario coverage
changes: Removed all wp:heading, wp:paragraph, and wp:separator blocks
Wrapped every block variation in takt/demo-container with descriptive title and description
Added missing scenarios: Dark Mode - 2 Columns, Dark Mode - No Header, Mixed Content Cards, Eyebrow Only Header
Total of 13 comprehensive test scenarios covering all edge cases

warnings: Asset size warnings (pre-existing, unrelated to changes)
Webpack performance recommendations (pre-existing, unrelated to changes)

lintStatus.note: Lint errors are pre-existing in other blocks (Hero, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialsCarousel, etc.). No lint errors in CardsGrid files modified in this session.

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP dark mode patterns now match exactly. Both use 'dark bg-transparent!' on section and 'relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8' on container.

variations: Default/Minimal - Light Mode (1 card, heading only)

fixesApplied.issue: Redundant manual attribute extraction in CardsGrid.php
fixesApplied.fix: Removed all manual $var = $attributes['key'] ?? default lines. Use auto-extracted variables directly with ?? for defaults. Kept only derived variables ($hasInnerBlocks, $hasHeader, $gridClasses).

fixesApplied.issue: Redundant manual attribute extraction in CardsGridItem.php
fixesApplied.fix: Removed all manual $var = $attributes['key'] ?? default lines. Use auto-extracted variables directly with ?? for defaults. Kept only derived variables ($columns, $hasImage, $hasButton).

fixesApplied.issue: Dark mode pattern does not match project standard
fixesApplied.fix: Updated dark mode pattern in both TSX and PHP: Section gets only 'dark bg-transparent!' (removed md:py-24). Container gets full pattern: 'py-10 md:py-15' padding and 'before:-inset-y-8' vertical pseudo-element inset. Both files now match exactly.

fixesApplied.issue: Section lacks aria-label fallback when no heading exists
fixesApplied.fix: Added aria-label='Cards Grid' to theme_block_props() when heading is empty. This follows the CardsCarousel pattern and ensures section always has an accessible name.

fixesApplied.issue: Test page uses old format (headings/paragraphs) instead of DemoContainer wrappers
fixesApplied.fix: Rewrote test page content to use takt/demo-container wrappers for all 13 variations. Each DemoContainer has descriptive title and description explaining what is being tested. Removed all wp:heading, wp:paragraph, wp:separator blocks.

nextSteps: 1. Dark mode pseudo-element now has correct padding (py-10 md:py-15 on container)
2. Dark mode pseudo-element vertical insets work correctly (before:-inset-y-8)
3. Section has aria-label when heading is empty
4. Auto-extracted variables work correctly in all scenarios
5. Test page DemoContainer wrappers display properly
